build.blocker: PWA service worker write failed: Unexpected early exit (terser renderChunk). Pre-existing; unrelated to COMMERCE-POWER-01 code changes.

affiliate-link-checker.evidence: FTC compliance: AffiliateBadge.tsx (Commission-linked label, tooltip); ProductCard.tsx uses isAffiliated prop; Shop.tsx, ProductDetail.tsx, IntelligenceCommerce.tsx, ShopProduct.tsx use product.affiliate_url / is_affiliated from DB. No affiliate edge function in supabase/functions/ (affiliate-link-wrapper not present in repo). affiliate_clicks table and buildAffiliateUrl in AffiliateBadge documented in verify_PAY-WO-04.

failures: affiliate-link-wrapper edge function not found under supabase/functions/
affiliate-link-tracker-auditor.evidence: affiliate_clicks in database.types.ts. buildAffiliateUrl in src/components/commerce/AffiliateBadge.tsx. FTC badge and disclosure on ProductCard, Shop, ProductDetail, IntelligenceCommerce, ShopProduct. Attribution path: click→buildAffiliateUrl→target_url with ref/pid; purchase attribution depends on affiliate-link-wrapper (missing).

hub-shell-detector.evidence: Commerce entry points: Shop.tsx (useProducts, loading/error/empty/grid); ProductDetail (useProduct, states); IntelligenceCommerce (useProducts, useIntelligence, loading/empty/content); ShopProduct (product detail); ProcurementDashboard (COMMERCE-WO-07). All have data hooks and state handling. Shop.tsx error state added this WO (refetch on error).

stripe-integration-tester.evidence: Stripe webhook (stripe-webhook, shop-checkout, create-checkout, manage-subscription). No hardcoded sk_test_/pk_test_ in src. COMMERCE-POWER-01 scope is FTC/affiliate only; Stripe unchanged.

changes_made: Added error state to Shop: destructure error and refetch from useProducts; render error panel with AlertTriangle, message, and Try again button; guard loading/empty/grid with !error so error takes precedence.
blocker_summary: npm run build exits 1 due to PWA/vite-plugin-pwa service worker write (terser renderChunk early exit). overall PASS requires tsc=0 and build=0 per GOVERNANCE.md §3.
